demographics.living_situation: lives at home; has moved so the bathroom is right next to the bed for quick access

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My bladder feels like it is burning constantly, and the pain is so severe I have to urinate every fifteen minutes just to get a moment of relief.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared up really badly about two days ago and I can't sleep or function — I'm up all night running to the toilet and the paracetamol does nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had this bladder problem for a long time — well over six weeks, really years — but it flared badly about 48 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: long-standing, and acutely much worse for the last two days
symptom_narrative.character: a constant burning in my bladder, and a deep pain low in my pelvis that builds up as my bladder fills and then eases right after I pass urine
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been, unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down in my belly and pelvis, right over my bladder
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the pain builds as the bladder fills and I get a few minutes of relief straight after weeing; the burning is there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: passing urine gives a short bit of relief, and a heat pad helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: as my bladder fills up; it got much worse after I'd been drinking a lot of citrus juice
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: having to wee up to 60 times a day, up all night, and pain during sex
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had these bladder pain flares for years and my urine tests have always come back clear — no infection
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sleep, I'm completely exhausted, and I can only move about within reach of a toilet

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing bladder pain condition — I've been told it's a bladder pain syndrome / interstitial cystitis — diagnosed years ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: diet changes and pain relief; my urine cultures have repeatedly been negative for infection

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I'd been drinking large amounts of acidic citrus juice in the days before it flared
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I'm severely exhausted and anxious from the lack of sleep and the pain I can't get on top of

objective_data_offered.value: up to 60 times in 24 hours, about every 15 minutes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: the patient's own count during a severe flare, not a formal bladder diary

objective_data_offered.value: my urine looks normal to me — I haven't seen any blood in it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: unaided visual self-report; not a formal urinalysis
